generated_oml:
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#

instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment [ BuildingInfrastructure ]
]

instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in Living Lab case study for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle optimization",
    base:contains [ TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, CO2Sensor, LightSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator ]
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy temperature sensor for environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData [ TemperatureDataTransmitted ]
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy humidity sensor for environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData [ HumidityDataTransmitted ]
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy CO2 sensor for environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData [ CO2DataTransmitted ]
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy light sensor for visual comfort assessment",
    DTDFVocab:producedData [ LightDataTransmitted ]
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy occupancy sensor for adaptive control policies",
    DTDFVocab:producedData [ OccupancyDataTransmitted ]
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom [ TemperatureSensor ]
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom [ HumiditySensor ]
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom [ CO2Sensor ]
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom [ LightSensor ]
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom [ OccupancySensor ]
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Integrated real-time sensor data from post-occupancy sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData [ TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, CO2DataTransmitted, LightDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted ],
    DTDFVocab:inputTo [ EclipseHono, EclipseDitto ]
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for building lighting control system with domain-specific control semantics"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for secure device communication and data ingestion",
    DTDFVocab:enables [ RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService ]
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and state synchronization",
    DTDFVocab:enables [ BIMModelingTools, VisualizationService ]
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization of building operations",
    DTDFVocab:enables [ VisualizationService ]
]

instance BIMModelingTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tools for semantic extraction and model-driven deployment",
    DTDFVocab:enables [ SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService ]
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based model with geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo [ BIMModelingTools ]
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for environmental conditions and system status",
    DTDFVocab:provides [ TemperatureInsight, HumidityInsight, CO2Insight, LightInsight, OccupancyInsight ]
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predictive analytics on energy, comfort, and health",
    DTDFVocab:provides [ EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortAssessmentInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectAnalysisInsight ]
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing energy consumption through adaptive control policies",
    DTDFVocab:provides [ EnergyOptimizationInsight, LightingControlAction ]
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization service using Unreal Engine 5 for facility management decisions",
    DTDFVocab:provides [ VisualComfortAssessmentInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectAnalysisInsight ]
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for building operations and scenario testing",
    DTDFVocab:provides [ SimulationInsight ]
]

instance TemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data insight for environmental monitoring"
]

instance HumidityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data insight for environmental monitoring"
]

instance CO2Insight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 data insight for indoor air quality"
]

instance LightInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time light level insight for visual comfort assessment"
]

instance OccupancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data insight for adaptive control policies"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for optimizing energy consumption based on predictive analytics"
]

instance VisualComfortAssessmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for assessing visual comfort levels in building spaces"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for analyzing non-visual health effects from environmental factors"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from simulation scenarios for building operations"
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting based on occupancy and light sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic [ true ]
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals sent from the digital twin to Building Control Systems (BCS) for operational adjustments, enabled by bidirectional communication through Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with no specific time intervals specified; continuous data exchange for immediate updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central hub framework integrating Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and standardized extension points for modular service-oriented DT platforms."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the complete building life cycle from initial design to refurbishments and adaptations during operation, enabling life cycle-encompassing optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure alignment between the digital twin and physical counterpart, ensuring interoperability and architectural soundness."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange; specific network protocols not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standardized BIM semantics for model-driven transformation, leveraging BIM as a construction industry standard, with standardized extension points for interoperability."
]
